pi_items.source: task.json description and export_result.sh TARGET_TITLE variable
task.json description explicitly requires these tags
task.json description and export_result.sh dynamic render test injections

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an 'Interactive Deployment Generator' tiddler with tags 'DevOps' and 'Runbook'. It must use state tiddlers '$:/state/deploy/app', '$:/state/deploy/tag', and '$:/state/deploy/port'. These are confirmed by export_result.sh which injects test data into these specific state paths to verify dynamic rendering. A synthetic 'Authentication Service' context tiddler is dynamically generated by setup_task.sh.
